element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary weapon throughout all stages; foundational mechanic
Low-threat obstacles present in all stages; variable difficulty
Enhanced attack variant; optional but effective throughout game
Health management mechanic; persistent resource across all stages

element_introduction_order.first_appears: End of each of 8 initial stages
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Major threats; defeat grants Master Weapon ability
Strategic tool; each Master has weakness to specific weapon

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Referenced in early stages; used as platform aid
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Support mechanic; enables access to alternate paths

element_introduction_order.element: Jet Mega Man (Rush Adaptor - flying form)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Spatial mobility tool; enables vertical exploration; prevents charge shots when active

element_introduction_order.element: Power Mega Man (Rush Adaptor - melee form)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Destruction tool; powerful short-range punch for breaking large blocks
Non-linear progression; decision-making on route selection
Resource management aid; prioritizes lowest weapon energy

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Scattered in specific pathways of stages
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Optional collectibles; four pieces enable Beat helper summon
Mid-stage threats; medium difficulty between zako and Robot Masters

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Available after collecting all 4 letter parts
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Optional combat aid; summoned to attack enemies

element_introduction_order.element: Mr. X / Dr. Wily final boss
element_introduction_order.first_appears: End of Mr. X Fortress (first phase)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Ultimate boss encounter; reveals true villain identity
Final stage; extreme difficulty; concludes narrative

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating Robot Master and acquiring new Master Weapon
Finding health pickups and energy pellets
Reaching stage branching point and choosing safer alternate path
Using Rush adaptors to bypass dangerous terrain
typical_tension_triggers: Low health state with limited pickups visible
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based progression: safe exploration with scattered enemy encounters → escalating mini-boss threats → Robot Master boss showdown → resource recovery → repeat cycle. Final stages (Mr. X/Wily fortress) compress cycle into sustained high tension with fewer relief moments.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Alternate pathways marked by Rush adaptor accessibility; letter circuit boards hidden in non-mandatory routes
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Pathways requiring specific Rush adaptor form (Jet or Power) conceal optional collectibles and alternate boss approaches

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory Robot Master stages with manageable zako enemy density; basic platforming with Rush adaptor mobility tools available; player accumulates Master Weapons for strategic advantage
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Robot Master encounters require strategy and weapon-matching; stage complexity increases with tighter platforming sections and mini-boss encounters; alternate pathways introduce optional navigation decisions
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mr. X Fortress multi-stage endgame gauntlet with sustained enemy pressure; final Dr. Wily encounter requires mastery of all mechanics and weapons; minimal health pickups; compressed tension cycles
notable_spikes: First Robot Master encounter (player learning curve)
Transition into Mr. X Fortress (sustained difficulty increase)
Dr. Wily reveal and final boss phase (escalated threat)

notable_level_patterns.description: Eight selectable stages (any order), each ending with unique boss; stage design emphasizes Master Weapon type relevance; contains zako waves, mini-bosses, platforming challenges; includes one primary path and one alternate path branching point requiring Rush adaptor
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any initial Robot Master stage (e.g., Blizzard Man, Flame Man, Knight Man)

notable_level_patterns.description: Many stages present two routes to boss: standard path vs. adaptor-gated path. Jet Mega Man enables vertical exploration; Power Mega Man breaks destructible barriers. Letter circuit boards exclusive to specific routes; both paths lead to boss but yield different optional rewards
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stages with Rush adaptor branching points (documented in gameplay descriptions)

notable_level_patterns.description: Mr. X Fortress and Dr. Wily's second fortress function as endgame gauntlets requiring sustained performance across multiple stages; escalating enemy density and mini-boss frequency; minimal resource recovery windows; culminates in final boss confrontation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mr. X Fortress (first phase) and Dr. Wily Fortress (second phase)

notable_level_patterns.description: Defeat Robot Master → acquire matching Master Weapon → identify weakness of next Master in optimal order → strategic stage selection creates player-driven pacing and difficulty modulation; Energy Balancer aids resource management across weapon switching
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Meta-pattern across all eight initial stages
